apps.name: NeoMovies
apps.subtitle: Movies & series streaming
apps.versionDescription: Latest release with Alloha support, quality selection, and episode switching
apps.localizedDescription:
Movies & series streaming client for mobile. Features:

• Alloha and Collaps sources
• HLS streaming with quality selection
• Voiceover and subtitle support
• Episode switching in player
• Continue watching
• Multi-language support (EN, RU, UK, BE, RO)

Note: This is a prerelease version. For stable releases, switch to the release branch.

permissions.usageDescription: Required for streaming movies and series

news.title: NeoMovies 0.1.0 Pre-release
news.caption: Cross-platform streaming client with Alloha support
